name: Pound Cake with Brandy & Lemon Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cream butter and powdered sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Sift flour into the mixture and add gradually, stirring gently.
5. Fold in vanilla extract, almond extract, brandy, and salt until combined.
6. Grease and flour a bundt or ring pan.
7. Pour batter into the prepared pan and bake for about 50 minutes.
8. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring to a cooling rack.
LEMON CREAM:
1. In a bowl, steep saffron in lemon juice for 20 minutes.
2. Whisk eggs and sugar until pale and creamy.
3. Gradually add lemon juice to the egg mixture, whisking continuously.
4. Cook the cream over a double boiler until thickened.
5. Add butter pieces and stir until melted and incorporated.
6. Cool the cream before using it as a topping for the cake.
